name: A1 · Givebutter → Supabase (donor + donation sync)
_doc: Importable n8n scaffold. Trigger: Givebutter webhook on new donation (⚑ confirm Givebutter webhook availability; else swap Webhook node for a Schedule+HTTP poll of the Givebutter API). Upserts donor, inserts donation (deduped on external_id). Configure Supabase + email credentials in n8n credential store, never inline.

parameters._note: Map donation fields + donor_id from the upsert output. external_id unique index dedupes retries.
Triggers A2 (receipt + first-gift welcome). Use Send Email / Givebutter email. Gate first-gift detection on donor having one donation.
